content_body: My husband and I spent the first two days on our own, with our almost-4-year-old son joining us for the second half of the visit. We saw the most impressive firework display on the 4th! We played lots of air hockey and the card game War, roasted marshmallows, relaxed, and had lots of family fun. Thanks for sharing this wonderful place with us!
title: 4th Of July In The Blue Ridge Mountains
